Volaris 1.0.0

GARCH(1,1) parameter calibration

garch_fit.Rd

Fits a GARCH(1,1) model to a historical return series via maximum likelihood estimation using the Nelder-Mead optimizer.

Usage

garch_fit(returns)

Arguments

returns

numeric vector: log-return series

Value

Returns a list with elements: omega, alpha, beta, log_likelihood, converged, persistence.

Examples

r <- diff(log(c(100, 101, 99, 102, 98, 103, 105, 104, 106, 103, 101)))
garch_fit(r)
#> $omega
#> [1] 0.0001343921
#> 
#> $alpha
#> [1] 6.109196e-08
#> 
#> $beta
#> [1] 0.8208135
#> 
#> $log_likelihood
#> [1] 30.97726
#> 
#> $converged
#> [1] TRUE
#> 
#> $persistence
#> [1] 0.8208135
#>
